title: Kilimo cha umwagiliaji kwa wakulima wadogo
text: Mpango huu wa kilimo unasaidia wakulima wadogo kutumia umwagiliaji wa bei nafuu na uhifadhi wa maji ili kuongeza mazao wakati wa ukame.
english_gloss: Affordable irrigation and water-saving support for smallholder farming during drought.

title: Tallafin asibiti a karkara
text: Shirin lafiya yana karfafa ma'aikatan jinya a asibitin karkara tare da kayan gwaji da horo ga iyalai masu nisa.
english_gloss: Rural clinic support with nurse training and diagnostic equipment for remote families.

title: Eto eko fun ile-iwe agbegbe
text: A tun se eto eko fun awon oluko ni ile-iwe agbegbe lati mu kika, imo oni-nomba, ati anfani awon omo dara si.
english_gloss: Teacher support for community schools to improve literacy, numeracy, and student opportunity.

title: Community market digitization
text: The market cooperative launched a multilingual catalog so traders can list produce, compare prices, and schedule deliveries by phone.
english_gloss: Digital trade platform for small traders and produce markets.

title: Afya ya mama na mtoto
text: Mradi wa afya ya mama na mtoto unaunganisha wajawazito na wahudumu wa jamii kwa ujumbe wa simu na ratiba za kliniki.
english_gloss: Maternal and child health outreach through mobile reminders and clinic coordination.

title: Kasuwa da bayanan farashi
text: Manoma da yan kasuwa suna samun bayanan farashi a kasuwa ta wayar hannu domin rage asara da inganta ciniki.
english_gloss: Mobile price intelligence for farmers and traders in local markets.

title: Omi mimu fun agbegbe
text: Ise agbese omi mimu n gbe rijin rijin omi ati akosile atunse fun agbegbe to jinna si ilu.
english_gloss: Clean water access and maintenance records for remote communities.

title: Climate adaptation knowledge hub
text: A retrieval-ready knowledge base links drought alerts, seed guidance, and local-language advisories for extension teams.
english_gloss: Climate adaptation guidance for extension teams and drought response.
